# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for a complete GCP application stack (Compute Engine, Cloud SQL, Cloud Storage, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure. Skip Cloud Logging and Monitoring configuration to reduce complexity in our initial MVP deployment.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent cloud monitoring.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

resources:

# VPC Network
- name: app-vpc-network
  type: compute.v1.network
  properties:
    autoCreateSubnetworks: false
    routingConfig:
      routingMode: REGIONAL

# Private Subnet for application tier
- name: app-private-subnet
  type: compute.v1.subnetwork
  properties:
    network: $(ref.app-vpc-network.selfLink)
    ipCidrRange: 10.0.1.0/24
    region: us-central1
    privateIpGoogleAccess: true
    logConfig:
      enable: true
      flowSampling: 0.5
      metadata: INCLUDE_ALL_METADATA

# Private Subnet for database tier
- name: db-private-subnet
  type: compute.v1.subnetwork
  properties:
    network: $(ref.app-vpc-network.selfLink)
    ipCidrRange: 10.0.2.0/24
    region: us-central1
    privateIpGoogleAccess: true
    logConfig:
      enable: true
      flowSampling: 0.5
      metadata: INCLUDE_ALL_METADATA

# Cloud Router for NAT
- name: app-cloud-router
  type: compute.v1.router
  properties:
    network: $(ref.app-vpc-network.selfLink)
    region: us-central1
    nats:
      - name: app-nat-gateway
        natIpAllocateOption: AUTO_ONLY
        sourceSubnetworkIpRangesToNat: ALL_SUBNETWORKS_ALL_IP_RANGES
        logConfig:
          enable: true
          filter: ERRORS_ONLY

# Firewall - Allow health checks from GCP load balancer ranges only
- name: allow-health-checks
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: $(ref.app-vpc-network.selfLink)
    priority: 1000
    direction: INGRESS
    allowed:
      - IPProtocol: TCP
        ports:
          - "8080"
    sourceRanges:
      - 130.211.0.0/22
      - 35.191.0.0/16
    targetTags:
      - app-server

# Firewall - Allow internal communication between app and db subnets
- name: allow-internal-app-to-db
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: $(ref.app-vpc-network.selfLink)
    priority: 1000
    direction: INGRESS
    allowed:
      - IPProtocol: TCP
        ports:
          - "3306"
    sourceRanges:
      - 10.0.1.0/24
    targetTags:
      - db-client

# Firewall - Allow SSH from IAP only (no direct SSH from internet)
- name: allow-iap-ssh
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: $(ref.app-vpc-network.selfLink)
    priority: 1000
    direction: INGRESS
    allowed:
      - IPProtocol: TCP
        ports:
          - "22"
    sourceRanges:
      - 35.235.240.0/20
    targetTags:
      - allow-iap-ssh

# Firewall - Deny all other ingress (explicit default deny)
- name: deny-all-ingress
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: $(ref.app-vpc-network.selfLink)
    priority: 65534
    direction: INGRESS
    denied:
      - IPProtocol: ALL
    sourceRanges:
      - 0.0.0.0/0

# Service Account for Compute Engine instances (least privilege)
- name: app-service-account
  type: iam.v1.serviceAccount
  properties:
    accountId: app-vm-sa
    displayName: Application VM Service Account
    projectId: {{ env["project"] }}

# IAM binding - Grant only Cloud SQL Client role to the VM service account
- name: app-sa-cloudsql-binding
  type: gcp-types/cloudresourcemanager-v1:virtual.projects.iamMemberBinding
  properties:
    resource: {{ env["project"] }}
    role: roles/cloudsql.client
    member: serviceAccount:$(ref.app-service-account.email)

# IAM binding - Grant only Storage Object Viewer to the VM service account
- name: app-sa-storage-binding
  type: gcp-types/cloudresourcemanager-v1:virtual.projects.iamMemberBinding
  properties:
    resource: {{ env["project"] }}
    role: roles/storage.objectViewer
    member: serviceAccount:$(ref.app-service-account.email)

# Instance Template for managed instance group
- name: app-instance-template
  type: compute.v1.instanceTemplate
  properties:
    properties:
      machineType: e2-medium
      tags:
        items:
          - app-server
          - allow-iap-ssh
      serviceAccounts:
        - email: $(ref.app-service-account.email)
          scopes:
            - https://www.googleapis.com/auth/cloud-platform
      disks:
        - deviceName: boot
          type: PERSISTENT
          boot: true
          autoDelete: true
          initializeParams:
            sourceImage: projects/debian-cloud/global/images/family/debian-12
            diskSizeGb: 20
            diskType: pd-ssd
      networkInterfaces:
        - network: $(ref.app-vpc-network.selfLink)
          subnetwork: $(ref.app-private-subnet.selfLink)
          # No accessConfigs - instances have no public IP
      shieldedInstanceConfig:
        enableSecureBoot: true
        enableVtpm: true
        enableIntegrityMonitoring: true
      metadata:
        items:
          - key: enable-oslogin
            value: "TRUE"
          - key: startup-script
            value: |
              #!/bin/bash
              set -euo pipefail

              # Update and install dependencies
              apt-get update -y
              apt-get install -y nginx wget

              # Configure nginx as reverse proxy with security headers
              cat > /etc/nginx/sites-available/default << 'NGINX_CONF'
              server {
                  listen 8080;
                  server_name _;

                  # Security headers
                  add_header X-Content-Type-Options "nosniff" always;
                  add_header X-Frame-Options "DENY" always;
                  add_header X-XSS-Protection "1; mode=block" always;
                  add_header Strict-Transport-Security "max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains" always;
                  add_header Content-Security-Policy "default-src 'self'" always;
                  add_header Referrer-Policy "strict-origin-when-cross-origin" always;

                  # Disable server version disclosure
                  server_tokens off;

                  # Limit request body size
                  client_max_body_size 10m;

                  location / {
                      proxy_pass http://127.0.0.1:3000;
                      proxy_set_header Host $host;
                      proxy_set_header X-Real-IP $remote_addr;
                      proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-For $proxy_add_x_forwarded_for;
                      proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-Proto $scheme;

                      # Timeouts
                      proxy_connect_timeout 10s;
                      proxy_read_timeout 30s;
                      proxy_send_timeout 30s;
                  }

                  location /health {
                      access_log off;
                      return 200 'OK';
                      add_header Content-Type text/plain;
                  }

                  # Deny access to hidden files
                  location ~ /\. {
                      deny all;
                      access_log off;
                      log_not_found off;
                  }
              }
              NGINX_CONF

              systemctl restart nginx
              systemctl enable nginx

# Health Check
- name: app-health-check
  type: compute.v1.healthCheck
  properties:
    type: HTTP
    httpHealthCheck:
      port: 8080
      requestPath: /health
    checkIntervalSec: 15
    timeoutSec: 5
    healthyThreshold: 2
    unhealthyThreshold: 3

# Regional Managed Instance Group
- name: app-instance-group-manager
  type: compute.v1.regionInstanceGroupManager
  properties:
    region: us-central1
    baseInstanceName: app-vm
    instanceTemplate: $(ref.app-instance-template.selfLink)
    targetSize: 2
    autoHealingPolicies:
      - healthCheck: $(ref.app-health-check.selfLink)
        initialDelaySec: 300
    distributionPolicy:
      zones:
        - zone: zones/us-central1-a
        - zone: zones/us-central1-b
    namedPorts:
      - name: http
        port: 8080

# Regional Autoscaler
- name: app-autoscaler
  type: compute.v1.regionAutoscaler
  properties:
    region: us-central1
    target: $(ref.app-instance-group-manager.selfLink)
    autoscalingPolicy:
      minNumReplicas: 2
      maxNumReplicas: 6
      cpuUtilization:
        utilizationTarget: 0.7
      coolDownPeriodSec: 120

# Backend Service
- name: app-backend-service
  type: compute.v1.backendService
  properties:
    protocol: HTTP
    portName: http
    healthChecks:
      - $(ref.app-health-check.selfLink)
    backends:
      - group: $(ref.app-instance-group-manager.instanceGroup)
        balancingMode: UTILIZATION
        maxUtilization: 0.8
        capacityScaler: 1.0
    sessionAffinity: NONE
    connectionDraining:
      drainingTimeoutSec: 300
    logConfig:
      enable: true
      sampleRate: 1.0
    securityPolicy: $(ref.app-cloud-armor-policy.selfLink)

# Cloud Armor Security Policy
- name: app-cloud-armor-policy
  type: compute.v1.securityPolicy
  properties:
    description: WAF policy for application
    rules:
      # Default rule - allow traffic
      - action: allow
        priority: 2147483647
        match:
          versionedExpr: SRC_IPS_V1
          config:
            srcIpRanges:
              - "*"
        description: Default allow rule
      # Block known bad IPs / rate limiting
      - action: deny(403)
        priority: 1000
        match:
          expr:
            expression: "evaluatePreconfiguredExpr('xss-v33-stable')"
        description: Block XSS attacks
      - action: deny(403)
        priority: 1001
        match:
          expr:
            expression: "evaluatePreconfiguredExpr('sqli-v33-stable')"
        description: Block SQL injection attacks
      - action: deny(403)
        priority: 1002
        match:
          expr:
            expression: "evaluatePreconfiguredExpr('lfi-v33-stable')"
        description: Block local file inclusion attacks
      - action: deny(403)
        priority: 1003
        match:
          expr:
            expression: "evaluatePreconfiguredExpr('rfi-v33-stable')"
        description: Block remote file inclusion attacks

# Static External IP for Load Balancer
- name: app-lb-ip
  type: compute.v1.globalAddress
  properties:
    ipVersion: IPV4

# URL Map
- name: app-url-map
  type: compute.v1.urlMap
  properties:
    defaultService: $(ref.app-backend-service.selfLink)

# SSL Certificate (managed)
- name: app-ssl-cert
  type: compute.v1.managedSslCertificate
  properties:
    managed:
      domains:
        - app.example.com
    type: MANAGED

# HTTPS Target Proxy
- name: app-https-proxy
  type: compute.v1.targetHttpsProxy
  properties:
    urlMap: $(ref.app-url-map.selfLink)
    sslCertificates:
      - $(ref.app-ssl-cert.selfLink)
    sslPolicy: $(ref.app-ssl-policy.selfLink)

# SSL Policy (enforce modern TLS)
- name: app-ssl-policy
  type: compute.v1.sslPolicy
  properties:
    profile: RESTRICTED
    minTlsVersion: TLS_1_2

# HTTPS Forwarding Rule
- name: app-https-forwarding-rule
  type: compute.v1.globalForwardingRule
  properties:
    target: $(ref.app-https-proxy.selfLink)
    IPAddress: $(ref.app-lb-ip.address)
    IPProtocol: TCP
    portRange: "443"
    loadBalancingScheme: EXTERNAL

# HTTP to HTTPS redirect
- name: app-http-redirect-url-map
  type: compute.v1.urlMap
  properties:
    defaultUrlRedirect:
      httpsRedirect: true
      redirectResponseCode: MOVED_PERMANENTLY_DEFAULT
      stripQuery: false

- name: app-http-proxy
  type: compute.v1.targetHttpProxy
  properties:
    urlMap: $(ref.app-http-redirect-url-map.selfLink)

- name: app-http-forwarding-rule
  type: compute.v1.globalForwardingRule
  properties:
    target: $(ref.app-http-proxy.selfLink)
    IPAddress: $(ref.app-lb-ip.address)
    IPProtocol: TCP
    portRange: "80"
    loadBalancingScheme: EXTERNAL

# Cloud SQL Instance (MySQL) with private IP only
- name: app-cloudsql-instance
  type: gcp-types/sqladmin-v1beta4:instances
  properties:
    region: us-central1
    databaseVersion: MYSQL_8_0
    settings:
      tier: db-n1-standard-2
      availabilityType: REGIONAL
      backupConfiguration:
        enabled: true
        binaryLogEnabled: true
        startTime: "03:00"
        transactionLogRetentionDays: 7
        backupRetentionSettings:
          retainedBackups: 30
          retentionUnit: COUNT
      ipConfiguration:
        ipv4Enabled: false
        privateNetwork: $(ref.app-vpc-network.selfLink)
        requireSsl: true
        enablePrivatePathForGoogleCloudServices: true
      dataDiskSizeGb: 50
      dataDiskType: PD_SSD
      storageAutoResize: true
      storageAutoResizeLimit: 200
      maintenanceWindow:
        day: 7
        hour: 4
        updateTrack: stable
      databaseFlags:
        - name: local_infile
          value: "off"
        - name: log_bin_trust_function_creators
          value: "off"
        - name: skip_show_database
          value: "on"
        - name: max_connections
          value: "500"
      userLabels:
        environment: production
        managed-by: deployment-manager

# Cloud SQL Database
- name: app-database
  type: gcp-types/sqladmin-v1beta4:databases
  properties:
    instance: $(ref.app-cloudsql-instance.name)
    name: appdb
    charset: utf8mb4
    collation: utf8mb4_unicode_ci

# Cloud SQL User - password should be set post-deployment via Secret Manager
# Using a placeholder that MUST be rotated immediately after deployment
- name: app-db-user
  type: gcp-types/sqladmin-v1beta4:users
  properties:
    instance: $(ref.app-cloudsql-instance.name)
    name: app_user
    host: "%"
    password: CHANGE_ME_IMMEDIATELY_USE_SECRET_MANAGER

# Cloud Storage Bucket - Application Assets
- name: app-assets-bucket
  type: storage.v1.bucket
  properties:
    name: {{ env["project"] }}-app-assets
    location: US-CENTRAL1
    storageClass: STANDARD
    iamConfiguration:
      uniformBucketLevelAccess:
        enabled: true
      publicAccessPrevention: enforced
    versioning:
      enabled: true
    lifecycle:
      rule:
        - action:
            type: Delete
          condition:
            numNewerVersions: 5
            isLive: false
        - action:
            type: Delete
          condition:
            daysSinceNoncurrentTime: 90
    encryption:
      defaultKmsKeyName: ""
    logging:
      logBucket: {{ env["project"] }}-access-logs
    cors: []
    labels:
      environment: production
      managed-by: deployment-manager

# Cloud Storage Bucket - Access Logs
- name: app-access-logs-bucket
  type: storage.v1.bucket
  properties:
    name: {{ env["project"] }}-access-logs
    location: US-CENTRAL1
    storageClass: STANDARD
    iamConfiguration:
      uniformBucketLevelAccess:
        enabled: true
      publicAccessPrevention: enforced
    versioning:
      enabled: false
    lifecycle:
      rule:
        - action:
            type: Delete
          condition:
            age: 365
    retentionPolicy:
      retentionPeriod: 7776000
    labels:
      environment: production
      purpose: access-logs
      managed-by: deployment-manager

# Private Service Access for Cloud SQL
- name: private-ip-range
  type: compute.v1.globalAddress
  properties:
    purpose: VPC_PEERING
    addressType: INTERNAL
    prefixLength: 16
    network: $(ref.app-vpc-network.selfLink)

- name: private-service-connection
  type: gcp-types/servicenetworking-v1:services.connections
  properties:
    network: projects/{{ env["project"] }}/global/networks/app-vpc-network
    reservedPeeringRanges:
      - $(ref.private-ip-range.name)
    service: servicenetworking.googleapis.com

outputs:
  - name: load-balancer-ip
    value: $(ref.app-lb-ip.address)
  - name: cloud-sql-connection-name
    value: $(ref.app-cloudsql-instance.connectionName)
  - name: assets-bucket-name
    value: $(ref.app-assets-bucket.name)
  - name: vpc-network
    value: $(ref.app-vpc-network.selfLink)
  - name: service-account-email
    value: $(ref.app-service-account.email)
  - name: important-post-deployment-actions
    value: >
      CRITICAL: 1) Rotate the Cloud SQL password immediately using Secret Manager.
      2) Update the managed SSL certificate domain to your actual domain.
      3) Configure DNS A record pointing your domain to the load balancer IP.
      4) Review and adjust Cloud Armor rules for your specific application.
      5) Set up application deployment pipeline to push code to instances.
